lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这座城市的发展速度太快了，以至于很多老建筑都消失了。
lines.pinyin: Zhè zuò chéngshì de fāzhǎn sùdù tài kuài le, yǐzhìyú hěn duō lǎo jiànzhù dōu xiāoshī le.
lines.english: This city has developed so fast that many old buildings have disappeared.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 归根结底，是因为经济利益和文化保护之间的矛盾。
lines.pinyin: Guīgēnjiédǐ, shì yīnwèi jīngjì lìyì hé wénhuà bǎohù zhījiān de máodùn.
lines.english: Ultimately, it's due to the contradiction between economic interests and cultural preservation.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 鉴于目前的情况，政府已经出台了新的保护政策。
lines.pinyin: Jiànyú mùqián de qíngkuàng, zhèngfǔ yǐjīng chūtái le xīn de bǎohù zhèngcè.
lines.english: Given the current situation, the government has issued new protection policies.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 就长远而言，我们需要在发展和保护之间找到平衡。
lines.pinyin: Jiù chángyuǎn éryán, wǒmen xūyào zài fāzhǎn hé bǎohù zhījiān zhǎo dào pínghéng.
lines.english: In the long run, we need to find a balance between development and preservation.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 必须仔细规划，以免将来后悔。
lines.pinyin: Bìxū zǐxì guīhuà, yǐmiǎn jiānglái hòuhuǐ.
lines.english: We must plan carefully to avoid regrets in the future.

title: Technology and Society
context: Debating the impact of AI on employment

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 人工智能的发展不可避免地改变了就业市场。
lines.pinyin: Réngōng zhìnéng de fāzhǎn bùkě bìmiǎn de gǎibiàn le jiùyè shìchǎng.
lines.english: The development of artificial intelligence has inevitably changed the job market.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 这件事不仅影响了制造业，乃至服务行业也受到了冲击。
lines.pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì bùjǐn yǐngxiǎng le zhìzàoyè, nǎizhì fúwù hángyè yě shòu dào le chōngjī.
lines.english: This has not only affected manufacturing, but even the service industry has been impacted.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 出于对未来的担忧，很多人开始学习新技能。
lines.pinyin: Chūyú duì wèilái de dānyōu, hěn duō rén kāishǐ xuéxí xīn jìnéng.
lines.english: Out of concern for the future, many people are starting to learn new skills.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 有鉴于此，教育体系也应该做出相应的调整。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu jiàn yú cǐ, jiàoyù tǐxì yě yīnggāi zuò chū xiāngyìng de tiáozhěng.
lines.english: In view of this, the education system should also make corresponding adjustments.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 迫不得已的时候，转行也是一种选择。
lines.pinyin: Pòbùdéyǐ de shíhòu, zhuǎnháng yě shì yì zhǒng xuǎnzé.
lines.english: When there's absolutely no alternative, changing careers is also an option.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 就医疗水平而言，城市和农村的差距还是很大。
lines.pinyin: Jiù yīliáo shuǐpíng éryán, chéngshì hé nóngcūn de chājù háishi hěn dà.
lines.english: In terms of medical standards, the gap between urban and rural areas is still very large.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 归根结底，这是资源分配不均的问题。
lines.pinyin: Guīgēnjiédǐ, zhè shì zīyuán fēnpèi bù jūn de wèntí.
lines.english: Ultimately, this is a problem of unequal resource distribution.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 鉴于农村地区医生严重不足，政府鼓励年轻医生去基层工作。
lines.pinyin: Jiànyú nóngcūn dìqū yīshēng yánzhòng bùzú, zhèngfǔ gǔlì niánqīng yīshēng qù jīcéng gōngzuò.
lines.english: Given the severe shortage of doctors in rural areas, the government encourages young doctors to work at the grassroots level.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 这个政策的效果如何，还有待观察，以免过早下结论。
lines.pinyin: Zhège zhèngcè de xiàoguǒ rúhé, hái yǒu dài guānchá, yǐmiǎn guò zǎo xià jiélùn.
lines.english: The effectiveness of this policy remains to be seen, to avoid drawing conclusions too early.
